name: Ion Exchange Chromatography (IEX)

briefSteps.en: Select anion (Q/DEAE, pI < pH) or cation (SP/CM, pI > pH) exchange resin → dialyze protein into low-salt buffer (conductivity <5 mS/cm) → equilibrate column → load sample → wash to baseline → elute with 0–500 mM NaCl linear gradient → pool and verify fractions by SDS-PAGE → desalt for storage
briefSteps.zh: 选择阴离子（Q/DEAE，pI < pH）或阳离子（SP/CM，pI > pH）交换树脂 → 将蛋白透析至低盐缓冲液（电导率 <5 mS/cm）→ 平衡柱子 → 上样 → 洗涤至基线 → 0–500 mM NaCl 线性梯度洗脱 → 合并峰组分并 SDS-PAGE 验证 → 脱盐后保存

detailedSteps.en: Determine appropriate ion exchange type based on protein pI: use anion exchange (Q or DEAE resin) if protein pI < buffer pH (protein is negatively charged); use cation exchange (SP or CM resin) if protein pI > buffer pH (protein is positively charged). Buffer pH should be ≥1 unit away from pI for strong binding.
detailedSteps.zh: 根据蛋白 pI 选择离子交换类型：若蛋白 pI < 缓冲液 pH（蛋白带负电），选阴离子交换（Q 或 DEAE 树脂）；若蛋白 pI > 缓冲液 pH（蛋白带正电），选阳离子交换（SP 或 CM 树脂）。缓冲液 pH 应距 pI ≥1 个单位以确保强结合。

detailedSteps.en: Prepare protein sample: dialyze into low-salt binding buffer (anion exchange: 20 mM Tris pH 8.0; cation exchange: 20 mM sodium acetate pH 5.5 or 20 mM MES pH 6.0). Centrifuge at 20,000×g for 20 min at 4°C, then filter through 0.22 µm. Conductivity must be <5 mS/cm.
detailedSteps.zh: 制备蛋白样品：透析至低盐结合缓冲液（阴离子交换：20 mM Tris pH 8.0；阳离子交换：20 mM 醋酸钠 pH 5.5 或 20 mM MES pH 6.0）。20,000×g、4°C 离心 20 min 后过 0.22 µm 膜。电导率须 <5 mS/cm。

detailedSteps.en: Equilibrate IEX column with 5 CV binding buffer at 1–2 mL/min (1 mL column) or 2–5 mL/min (5 mL column). Monitor A280 until baseline is stable and conductivity matches binding buffer.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 5 CV 结合缓冲液以 1–2 mL/min（1 mL 柱）或 2–5 mL/min（5 mL 柱）平衡 IEX 柱。监测 A280 至基线稳定，且电导率与结合缓冲液一致。

detailedSteps.en: Load protein sample at ≤1 mL/min to maximize binding (capacity: ~20 mg protein/mL resin). Collect flow-through fraction — save an aliquot for SDS-PAGE to assess binding efficiency.
detailedSteps.zh: 以 ≤1 mL/min 上样以最大化结合（容量：约 20 mg 蛋白/mL 树脂）。收集穿透液组分——留样做 SDS-PAGE 评估结合效率。

detailedSteps.en: Wash with 5–10 CV binding buffer until A280 returns to baseline. This removes unbound and weakly bound contaminants. Collect wash fractions for SDS-PAGE analysis.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 5–10 CV 结合缓冲液洗涤至 A280 返回基线，去除未结合和弱结合的杂蛋白。收集洗涤液做 SDS-PAGE 分析。

detailedSteps.en: Elute bound protein with a linear gradient of 0–100% elution buffer (binding buffer + 1 M NaCl) over 20 CV (e.g., 0→500 mM NaCl). Collect 1 mL fractions. Alternative: step gradient at 100, 250, 500 mM NaCl.
detailedSteps.zh: 用 0–100% 洗脱缓冲液（结合缓冲液 + 1 M NaCl）在 20 CV 内线性梯度洗脱（如 0→500 mM NaCl）。收集 1 mL 组分。也可用阶梯梯度（100、250、500 mM NaCl）。

detailedSteps.en: Pool symmetric peak fractions. Run SDS-PAGE on all fractions spanning the peak to verify protein identity and purity. Asymmetric or split peaks indicate multiple protein species.
detailedSteps.zh: 合并对称峰组分。对覆盖峰值的所有组分进行 SDS-PAGE，验证蛋白身份和纯度。不对称或分裂峰表明存在多种蛋白组分。

detailedSteps.en: Desalt pooled fractions by dialysis against storage buffer (dialysis_buffer_generic) with 2 buffer changes at 4°C, or use HiTrap Desalting column. Add 10% glycerol and store at −80°C.
detailedSteps.zh: 将合并组分对储存缓冲液（dialysis_buffer_generic）于 4°C 换液 2 次透析脱盐，或用 HiTrap Desalting 柱脱盐。加 10% 甘油后 −80°C 保存。

note.en: Dialyzed protein in low-salt buffer can be stored at 4°C overnight or at −80°C before loading onto the IEX column.
note.zh: 低盐缓冲液中的透析蛋白可在 4°C 保存过夜或 −80°C 冷冻后再上 IEX 柱。

note.en: Equilibrated column can be stored at 4°C in binding buffer overnight before sample loading.
note.zh: 已平衡的柱子可在 4°C 结合缓冲液中保存过夜后再上样。

note.en: Collected elution fractions can be stored at 4°C overnight or at −80°C before pooling and desalting.
note.zh: 收集到的洗脱组分可在 4°C 保存过夜或 −80°C 冷冻，合并脱盐后再处理。

components.name: 1. Choose ion exchange type based on protein pI

note.en: Anion exchange (Q/DEAE): protein pI < buffer pH → protein (−) binds to resin (+). Cation exchange (SP/CM): protein pI > buffer pH → protein (+) binds to resin (−). For unknown pI: run at two pH values.
note.zh: 阴离子交换（Q/DEAE）：蛋白 pI < 缓冲液 pH → 蛋白带负电结合正电树脂。阳离子交换（SP/CM）：蛋白 pI > 缓冲液 pH → 蛋白带正电结合负电树脂。pI 未知时：在两个 pH 条件下试运行。

components.name: 2. Prepare sample: dialyze into low-salt IEX buffer; centrifuge 20,000×g 20 min; filter 0.22 µm

note.en: Anion: 20 mM Tris pH 8.0. Cation: 20 mM sodium acetate pH 5.5 or 20 mM MES pH 6.0. Conductivity <5 mS/cm for binding.
note.zh: 阴离子：20 mM Tris pH 8.0。阳离子：20 mM 醋酸钠 pH 5.5 或 20 mM MES pH 6.0。电导率 <5 mS/cm 以确保结合。

note.en: Flow rate: 1–2 mL/min (1 mL column) or 2–5 mL/min (5 mL column). Monitor A280 baseline stable.
note.zh: 流速：1–2 mL/min（1 mL 柱）或 2–5 mL/min（5 mL 柱）。监测 A280 基线稳定。

components.name: 4. Load sample: apply at 0.5–1 mL/min; collect flow-through for SDS-PAGE

note.en: Loading at ≤1 mL/min maximizes binding. Capacity: ~20 mg protein/mL resin (depends on charge/size).
note.zh: 上样流速 ≤1 mL/min 以最大化结合。容量：约 20 mg 蛋白/mL 树脂（取决于电荷/大小）。

components.name: 5. Wash: 5–10 CV binding buffer until A280 returns to baseline
6. Elute with linear gradient: 0–100% elution buffer over 20 CV

note.en: Elution buffer: binding buffer + 1 M NaCl. Gradient: 0→100% over 20 CV (e.g., 0→500 mM NaCl). Collect 1 mL fractions. Alternative: step gradient (0, 100, 250, 500 mM).
note.zh: 洗脱缓冲液：结合缓冲液 + 1 M NaCl。梯度：0→100% 20 CV（如 0→500 mM NaCl）。收集 1 mL 组分。也可阶梯梯度（0、100、250、500 mM）。

components.name: 7. Pool peak fractions; verify by SDS-PAGE

note.en: Pool symmetric peak. Asymmetric = multiple species.
note.zh: 合并对称峰。不对称 = 多种组分。

components.name: 8. Dialyze or desalting to remove salt for storage

note.en: dialysis_buffer_generic or HiTrap Desalting. Add 10% glycerol for storage.
note.zh: dialysis_buffer_generic 或 HiTrap Desalting 脱盐。加 10% 甘油保存。

notes.en: IEX is excellent for separating proteins by surface charge. Typically used after IMAC/GST (polishing step). Binding capacity: 10–40 mg/mL resin. Resolution depends on gradient length (longer = better). Run at 4°C for labile proteins. Buffer pH should be ≥1 pH unit away from protein pI for strong binding.
notes.zh: IEX 非常适合按表面电荷分离蛋白。通常在 IMAC/GST 后使用（精修步骤）。结合容量：10–40 mg/mL 树脂。分辨率取决于梯度长度（越长越好）。不稳定蛋白在 4°C 运行。缓冲液 pH 应距离蛋白 pI ≥1 个 pH 单位以确保强结合。

ref: GE Healthcare Ion Exchange Chromatography Manual; Shukla & Cramer (2011) Curr Protoc Protein Sci 67:8.2.1

materials.name: Ion exchange column (Q/SP/DEAE Sepharose or similar)
Low-salt buffer (Buffer A, 20 mM Tris, 0–50 mM NaCl)
High-salt buffer (Buffer B, 20 mM Tris, 1 M NaCl)

usage.en: Separate proteins by charge using anion or cation exchange chromatography.
usage.zh: 阴离子/阳离子交换层析按电荷分离蛋白质。
